name: giftee-wallet-tool
description: Desktop tool to scan TL-APP Giftee links and merge remaining Giftee points into Gift Wallet.

scripts.check: node --check scan_giftee_links.js && node --check verify_tl_app_session.js && node --check verify_wallet_session.js && node --check scan_tl_app_history.js && node --check merge_giftee_points.js
